{{Quote|You'd think they'd hire cops who weren't so ''clumsy'', eh?|Phootie, to his Kitonak partner|<ref name="Shatterpoint (novel)">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>}}
'''Phootie''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pho Ph'eahian]] comedian who traveled during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] with a [[Kitonak/Legends|Kitonak]] to [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. On this trip, he traveled in the same shuttle as [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] during the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] mission there. He was menaced by local law enforcement along with his partner at the [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], and made light of the situation after Windu dealt with the arrogant officers.

==Appearances==
